tier1.name: clockify_switch_project
tier1.description: Stop the current timer and start a new one on a different project

project.description: Project name or ID to switch to

tier1.description: Check if a timer is currently running and show elapsed time

tier1.description: List time entries for the current day

tier1.name: clockify_update_entry
tier1.description: Update an existing time entry (fetch-then-update merge)

tier1.name: clockify_weekly_summary
tier1.description: Get a weekly summary for the current user, grouped by day and project. This is a safe wrapper built over time-entry data rather than a separate reports API.

max_entries.description: Optional per-request cap override (bounded by server CLOCKIFY_REPORT_MAX_ENTRIES). 0 = unlimited (server cap still applies).

timezone.description: Optional IANA timezone, defaults to local/server timezone.

week_start.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp or YYYY-MM-DD date. Defaults to Monday of the current week in local time.
